assemble.tag: Composite tags implement complex user filtering rules by combining multiple basic tags
assemble.title: Composite Tag
assemble.description: Only one of Channel Source and Proxy Group can be selected. Not selecting means all. Multiple selections supported.
assemble.tipsRule1: At least one condition group must be configured
assemble.tipsRule2: Tags within the same group are OR (any one satisfied)
assemble.tipsRule3: Different groups are AND (all must be satisfied)
assemble.tipsRule4: Example: Group 1 (Deposit 200+ OR Deposit 500+) AND Group 2 (VIP3 and above) = users with deposits above 200 and VIP3 or above
